security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*

bundle.shortDescription: Desktop agent that operates any app via Accessibility APIs
bundle.longDescription: Weaver is a desktop agent that uses the system's Accessibility APIs (AT-SPI on Linux) to read and control any application, allowing an LLM-driven agent loop to plan, execute, verify and reflect on multi-step tasks across programs.
